problem id: c7a37cda
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00100100 -> 10010010
  11001101 -> 11000110
  00011110 -> 11001111
  00010011 -> 01101001
  11111100 -> 11111110
  10000011 -> 00100001
  01101111 -> 11010111
  00111101 -> 10111110

query: 00100101
predicted answer: 10110010
